ham.subject: Scheduled IT Maintenance – March 15, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that the company IT infrastructure will undergo routine maintenance on **March 15, 2026, from 11:00 PM to 2:00 AM UTC**. During this window, the following services will be temporarily unavailable:

- Internal web portal (intranet.example.com)
- Email server (mail.example.com)
- VPN gateway (vpn.example.com)

All users will automatically lose access at 11:00 PM. If you have critical meetings scheduled, please plan accordingly. The IT department will notify you via Slack and email one hour before the shutdown.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Cloud Account Will Be Suspended – Verify Now!
spam.body:
Hello,

This is an automated message from **Cloud Security Services**. Our records indicate unusual activity on your cloud account (Account ID: 7832-UXT-109). To protect your assets, we must temporarily suspend your account until you verify the request.

Failure to act within **24 hours** will result in permanent loss of all data and services. Click the link below to confirm your identity and restore access:

<URL>

If you do not want to lose your data, act immediately. Failure to comply may lock your account and trigger an audit.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,
Cloud Security Team
